A

ActivityConfig - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model
Configuration for the weekly activity bonus task.
ActivityConfig() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.ActivityConfig
 
ActivityTracker - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.checker
Counts active commit weeks and calculates the corresponding bonus.
ActivityTracker(GitManager) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.checker.ActivityTracker
 
add(TestCounts) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.results.TestCounts
Adds counts from another instance (used when aggregating multiple XML files).
addBonusEntry(BonusEntry) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.OopCheckerConfig
Appends a bonus entry.
addCheckPoint(CheckPoint) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.OopCheckerConfig
Appends a grading checkpoint.
addGroup(Group) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.OopCheckerConfig
Appends a student group.
addStudent(Student) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.Group
Adds a student to this group.
addTask(Task) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.OopCheckerConfig
Appends a task definition.
addTaskId(String) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.CheckPoint
Adds a task id that counts toward this checkpoint.
addTaskResult(TaskCheckResult) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.results.StudentCheckResult
Appends a task result.

Loads configuration from a Groovy DSL file (oop_checker.groovy).

countActiveWeeks(Path, ActivityConfig) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.checker.ActivityTracker
Counts weeks in which the student made at least one commit within the course period.

Finds a student by their GitHub login across all groups.

getLastCommitDate(Path, String) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.checker.GitManager
Returns the date of the last commit that touched the given subdirectory.

getTotal() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.results.TestCounts
Returns total number of tests (passed + failed + skipped).
getTotalScore() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.model.results.StudentCheckResult
Returns total score across all tasks plus the activity bonus.

Performs git operations (clone, update, log queries) via the console git client.

Orchestrates the check pipeline for all students and tasks.
